name: urgent-care-operations
description: Walk-in / episodic urgent care operations team — 2 agents (urgent-care-operations-lead for patient throughput and door-to-door time, split-flow/fast-track, provider & MA/tech staffing to the demand curve, ancillary services (on-site x-ray, POCT/labs, procedures), scope of service and multi-site; urgent-care-revenue-and-payer-specialist for payer mix and in-network contracting, occupational-medicine employer contracts, visit-level economics (E/M distribution, ancillary capture), and self-pay/price-transparency). Fluent in urgent-care EMR/PM (Experity, Athenahealth) and UCA benchmarks. 3 skills, a 2-doc knowledge bank (operations decision tree + 2026 patterns), and 2 templates. Distinct from medical-revenue-cycle (coding/billing/claims), behavioral-health-practice (therapy/psych), and senior-care-operations (residential senior living). Advisory only — clinical protocols, coding/billing, and licensing are flagged to a professional, not decided. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
